title: chrysanthemum cadmeum
intro: Chrysanthemum cadmeum, also known as Golden Flower or Cadmeum Chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum cadmeum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the flowers are often made into tea, infusions, or tinctures to harness their medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
